name: objective-see-mcp-server
description: MCP server wrapping Patrick Wardle's Objective-See macOS security tools (KnockKnock, TaskExplorer, Netiquette, FileMonitor, ProcessMonitor, DNSMonitor) plus launch/install/schedule control for the GUI tools (BlockBlock, OverSight, DoNotDisturb, ReiKey, RansomWhere, ...).
